summary: Iteration 29: Full security and performance audit verification. All 17 audit findings verified as correctly implemented. 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass. Demo login flows (Manager + Referee) working. All pages render correctly (Dashboard, Messages, Settings, Profile, Manager with all 8 tabs).

test_results.yarn_test: PASS — 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass (12 in constants.test.js, 17 in mappers.test.js). Exits 0 in 1.02s.
test_results.S1_notification_batch_chunking: PASS — markAllNotificationsReadRecord uses chunkArray(snap.docs, 400) to batch writes under Firestore's 500-write limit (line 390-395 in firestoreService.js)
test_results.S2_profile_update_whitelist: PASS — ALLOWED_PROFILE_FIELDS = Set(['name', 'phone', 'experience', 'bio', 'location']) in AuthContext.jsx (line 225). updateProfile filters updates through safeUpdates object.
test_results.S3_serverTimestamp_usage: PASS — serverTimestamp() used for created_at in sendMessageRecord (line 325), assignReferee notification (line 275), and message notification (line 331)
test_results.S4_FCM_Analytics_pushEnabled: PASS — Analytics.pushEnabled() called in useFCM.js line 85 when FCM token is successfully registered
test_results.S5_neutral_toast_wording: PASS — Profile.jsx and Settings.jsx both use neutral wording: 'Coming Soon' title with 'This feature is on our roadmap and will be available in a future update.' description. No AI/prompt mentions.
test_results.P1_no_refetch_on_read: PASS — useNotificationActions.js has '// P1 fix: no fetchData' comments (lines 8, 18). useMessageActions.js has '// P1 fix: no fetchData call' comment (line 36). markMessageAsRead does NOT call fetchData.
test_results.P2_message_limit_aligned: PASS — Both firestoreService.js fetchAppData (line 111) and useRealtimeMessages.js (line 56) use limit(100)
test_results.P3_dashboard_useMemo: PASS — Dashboard.jsx uses useMemo for: upcomingGames (line 42), recentPayments (line 49), totalEarnings (line 50), pendingPayments (line 51), recentActivity (line 52)
test_results.Q1_rating_fallback_NA: PASS — Dashboard.jsx line 78: value: user?.rating || 'N/A' (not hardcoded '4.8')
test_results.Q2_useRealtimeMessages_usersMap_dep: PASS — useRealtimeMessages.js has useEffect with [usersMap] dependency (line 40-42) to keep usersMapRef.current updated
test_results.Q3_demoDataService_deleted: PASS — /app/src/lib/demoDataService.js does NOT exist. Only demoAccounts.js present.
test_results.Q4_supabase_removed: PASS — No '@supabase/supabase-js' in package.json. grep returns empty.
test_results.demo_manager_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → dialog opens → 'Log in as Manager' → navigates to /manager. 'League Management' page rendered with all 8 tabs.
test_results.demo_referee_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → dialog opens → 'Log in as Referee' → navigates to /dashboard. 'Welcome back, Demo Referee' shown with rating 4.7/5.0.
test_results.messages_page: PASS — /messages loads with Inbox, search input, New Message button, message list visible with timestamps
test_results.settings_page: PASS — /settings loads with notification toggles (Game Notifications, Communication, Delivery Methods), App Preferences, Account & Security sections
test_results.profile_page: PASS — /profile loads with Edit button, Change Photo, Performance Ratings section, Account Actions
test_results.manager_page_tabs: PASS — All 8 tabs present: Tournaments, Assignments, Roster, Referees, Availability, Leaderboard, Standings, Reports

code_review.firestoreService.js: PASS — chunkArray helper (line 44), serverTimestamp imports and usage, limit(100) for messages/notifications, toISOString export
code_review.AuthContext.jsx: PASS — ALLOWED_PROFILE_FIELDS whitelist, safeUpdates filtering in updateProfile
code_review.useNotificationActions.js: PASS — No fetchData calls after marking read
code_review.useMessageActions.js: PASS — No fetchData call in markMessageAsRead
code_review.useRealtimeMessages.js: PASS — usersMapRef pattern with [usersMap] dependency useEffect
code_review.useFCM.js: PASS — Analytics.pushEnabled() called on successful token registration
code_review.Dashboard.jsx: PASS — useMemo for all computed values, rating fallback 'N/A'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (17/17 audit items verified, 29/29 unit tests pass, all UI flows working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 all green. Full security and performance audit verified: S1 (batch chunking), S2 (profile whitelist), S3 (serverTimestamp), S4 (FCM analytics), S5 (neutral toasts), P1 (no refetch on read), P2 (limit aligned), P3 (useMemo), Q1 (rating N/A), Q2 (usersMap dep), Q3 (demoDataService deleted), Q4 (supabase removed). All demo login flows working. All pages render correctly.
rca_of_issues: N/A — No bugs found. All 17 audit findings verified correctly.
